creator: lippe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Em Fri, 30 May 2008 05:16:25 -0700 (PDT)
Christos <christosbr@yahoo.com.br> escreveu:

> No, the problem was not solved.
> 
> 
> 
> ----- Original Message ----
> From: Felippe de Meirelles Motta <lippe@FreeBSD.org>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org; christos avramidis
> <christosbr@yahoo.com.br> Sent: Thursday, May 29, 2008 11:01:38 PM
> Subject: Re: ports/112385: sysutils/lookupd on Kernel 64
> 
> Hi Submitter,
> 
> You can confirm us that this problem was solved ?
> 

I could not reproduce here (amd64/7-STABLE). This port has been fixed
on amd64/ia64 plataforms on 14 juny of 2007, as you can see here:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/112621

I think that you have tested with the -fPIC flag on your compilation,
right ? If it not solve, I'll send a mail to author reporting.

Thanks for your report! :)

-- 
lippe@FreeBSD.org
Felippe de Meirelles Motta
